color_profiles.name: Blue Celestite
color_profiles.cause: Color centers from trace impurities and/or radiation effects; mechanism not fully established.

color_profiles.name: Orange / Yellow Celestite
color_profiles.cause: Iron oxide staining or trace impurities.

visual_notes: Madagascar celestite geodes — hollow limestone nodules lined with pale-blue tabular crystals — are among the most widely sold mineral specimens globally. The celestial blue color is gentle and consistent. Crystals often have a translucent quality with pearly luster on cleavage surfaces.

optical_effects.fluorescence: Some specimens fluoresce pale blue or white under SW UV
optical_effects.chatoyancy: Fibrous material may show weak cat's eye
